fileContext.overview: ClaudeProvider is an LLM provider that connects to the Anthropic API.

symbols.name: ClaudeProvider
symbols.behavior: Handles API requests and responses to provide LLM functionality
symbols.limitations: Requires Anthropic API key and model name

symbols.name: complete
symbols.purpose: Completes a conversation with the LLM
symbols.behavior: Sends a request to the Anthropic API and returns the response
symbols.limitations: May throw errors if API request fails
